description: PLMKR Sync Agent knowledge base — load order for system prompt assembly

files.description: Four-dimension scoring rubric, hard gates, verdict ladder, PROVISIONAL composite doctrine
Gatekeeper buying psychology, music supervisor psychology, brief anatomy, funded-vs-fishing doctrine, honest-pass discipline
Clearance chain rule, canonical workflow, status taxonomy, one-stop doctrine, turnaround norms by buyer class
Six dials of a license, negotiation structures, fee tiering, quote posture doctrine, gratis-use doctrine
Five output templates: Brief-Fit Scorecard, Fee Quote Sheet, Pitch Email Draft, Clearance Chain Map, Turnaround Tracker

notes.entity_wall: These files are PLMKR-owned originals. Do not reference external sources, toolchain identifiers, or entity names from source material.
notes.mock_mode: All assessment routes default to SYNC_AGENT_MOCK_MODE=true — no live Anthropic calls during testing.
